name: D/D/D/D Dimensional King Arc Crisis
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>偉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>次</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>元</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アーク・クライシス
name_jp_tl: D/D/D/D Great Dimensional King Arc Crisis
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
You can target any number of "Dark Contract" cards you control; destroy them, then you can Special Summon up to that many "Doom King" Pendulum Monsters from your Deck and/or Extra Deck. You can only use this effect of "D/D/D/D Dimensional King Arc Crisis" once per turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
4 Fiend monsters (1 Fusion, 1 Synchro, 1 Xyz, and 1 Pendulum)
Must be either Fusion Summoned, or Special Summoned (from your face-down Extra Deck) by banishing the above cards from your field and/or GY. You can only Special Summon "D/D/D/D Dimensional King Arc Crisis" once per turn this way, no matter which method you use. If this card is Special Summoned: You can negate the effects of all face-up monsters your opponent currently controls. Can attack all your opponent's monsters, once each. If this card in the Monster Zone is destroyed: You can place this card in your Pendulum Zone.
pend_eff: You can target any number of "Dark Contract" cards you control; destroy them, then you can Special Summon up to that many "Doom King" Pendulum Monsters from your Deck and/or Extra Deck. You can only use this effect of "D/D/D/D Dimensional King Arc Crisis" once per turn.
